# External Docs

**Purpose:** Define the scope and naming rules for external-facing handoff docs shared with sibling Styio repositories.

**Last updated:** 2026-04-23

## Scope

1. Keep sibling-repository handoff material under `for-*` subdirectories.
2. Keep repository-local semantics in the owning `docs/design/`, `docs/specs/`, or `docs/plans/` SSOT.

## Naming Rules

1. Use `for-<repo-or-consumer>/` for handoff collections.
2. Regenerate [INDEX.md](./INDEX.md) after changes.

## Inventory

See [INDEX.md](./INDEX.md).
